author: Maksimilians Aleksandrovics
name: JEPA V2: EMA Teacher + Attention Predictor + 11L + LeakyReLU2 + SWA + Partial RoPE
blurb: Builds on JEPA V1 with four additional improvements from top leaderboard entries: 11 layers (from 10), LeakyReLU(0.5)^2 activation preserving negative gradient flow, student EMA weight averaging (decay=0.997) for better generalization, and Partial RoPE (25% of head dims) allowing position-invariant attention in remaining dimensions. JEPA EMA teacher still discarded before serialization — zero byte cost.
